expectations.text: Uses a concise but meaningful task name
expectations.evidence: Uses `api-server` and treats it as the stable task identity.

expectations.text: Explains rerun as reuse of the same task slot when possible
expectations.evidence: Directly says to reuse the existing `api-server` task slot instead of creating duplicates.

expectations.text: Preserves task identity and underlying window id when practical
expectations.evidence: Explains that reuse keeps the task identity and underlying window id more stable.
Connects reuse to more stable observation of success, failure, input waiting, and disappearance.
Keeps the response concise and policy-oriented rather than shell-heavy.
